title: Homer is a small city on Kachemak Bay, on Alaska's Kenai Peninsula — view across the bay
description: View from Homer across Kachemak Bay to the Kenai Mountains, with forested coastal peninsulas in the mid-distance and a small glacier visible high on the range.
alt: Forested peninsulas and snow-touched Kenai Mountain peaks seen from Homer across Kachemak Bay
